title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Julia Turc provides an in-depth technical analysis of the Flow Matching training algorithm, covering time-variant probability densities, velocity fields, continuous normalizing flows, and optimal transport. The video walks through the complete Flow Matching algorithm including conditional velocity fields and Rectified Flow variants.
